2255-the-terran-empire-s-new-flagship-th: In the mirror universe, the Terran Empire launches its new flagship, the ISS Charon, from the Imperial Shipyard at Epsilon Indi IV.
2255-the-uss-enterprise-undergoes-constr: The USS Enterprise is under construction at the Riverside Shipyard in Iowa.

2256-the-klingon-reactionary-leader-t-ku: The Klingon reactionary T'Kuvma begins rallying like-minded Klingons into an anti-Federation, nationalist movement.

2256-the-uss-buran-is-ambushed-and-all-h: The USS Buran is ambushed with only Gabriel Lorca surviving — though the survivor is his mirror-universe counterpart.

2257-the-discovery-crew-still-led-by-sar: Still under Saru, the Discovery crew head for Vulcan to collect the ship's new commanding officer, but stop en route to answer a distress call from Captain Christopher Pike's Enterprise.
2257-the-discovery-makes-first-contact-w: The Discovery makes first contact with the New Eden colony on Terralysium.
2257-the-shakespearian-troupe-karidian-c: The Karidian Company of Players, a Shakespearean troupe sponsored by the Galactic Cultural Exchange Project, begins touring official installations.
2257-the-uss-discovery-returns-from-the-: Discovery reappears from the mirror universe, nine months after departing the prime one.
2257-two-hundred-crewmembers-of-the-farr: A dikironium cloud creature kills two hundred Farragut crew members at Tycho IV, including Captain Garrovick, and the ship's first officer commends Lieutenant Kirk for his actions there.
2258-admiral-alexander-marcus-discovers-: Alexander Marcus finds the SS Botany Bay and presses Khan Noonien Singh into Starfleet service as John Harrison.
2258-ash-tyler-is-offered-command-of-sec: Ash Tyler is offered command of Section 31.
2258-christopher-pike-is-promoted-to-adm: Christopher Pike is promoted to admiral, James T. Kirk succeeds him as captain of the Enterprise, and Ambassador Spock leads Vulcan's survivors in founding New Vulcan while advising his younger self to stay in Starfleet.
2258-christopher-pike-returns-to-the-ent: Christopher Pike resumes command of the Enterprise.
2258-citing-starfleet-regulation-157-sec: Citing Starfleet Regulation 157, Spock recommends that the USS Discovery, its crew, and its spore drive go undiscussed under penalty of treason.
2258-doctor-joseph-m-benga-s-daughter-ru: Doctor Joseph M'Benga's daughter Rukiya is diagnosed with cygnokemia.
2258-en-route-cadet-james-kirk-who-has-s: Stowed away with McCoy's help, Cadet Kirk overhears the mission briefing, recognizes parallels to the USS Kelvin's destruction at his own birth, and alerts Pike, who readies the Enterprise for action.
2258-in-the-official-records-of-starflee: Starfleet's official records list the USS Discovery as destroyed, omitting any mention of the spore drive, Red Angel, or Control.
2258-james-t-kirk-takes-the-kobayashi-ma: Kirk takes the Kobayashi Maru test a third time, having secretly reprogrammed it, and becomes the only cadet to beat the no-win scenario.
2258-katie-wesley-is-born-to-bob-wesley: Katie Wesley born to Bob Wesley.
2258-kirk-and-spock-board-the-narada-to-: Kirk and Spock board the Narada; Spock steals the Jellyfish while Kirk fights through Nero's guards and Ayel, and the crew beams clear of the Jellyfish just before it collides with the Narada, igniting the red matter into a black hole that swallows the ship, in the first beam-out where Scott pulls three people off two targets onto one pad.
2258-kirk-olson-and-sulu-space-dive-onto: Kirk, Olson and Sulu dive onto the drilling platform; Olson dies in the descent, but Kirk and Sulu disable the drill, too late to stop Nero deploying the red matter, and Chekov beams them back aboard.
2258-nero-is-first-seen-by-the-federatio: Nero makes first contact with the Federation, tells the native Spock he wants him to witness something, and orders Captain Pike aboard the Narada, as he once did with Richard Robau twenty-five years earlier.
2258-on-stardate-2258-42-february-11-the: Nero destroys Vulcan with red matter, killing some six billion and leaving an estimated ten thousand survivors, and takes Captain Pike hostage aboard the Narada.
2258-pike-agrees-and-is-accompanied-by-k: Pike agrees to go, taking Kirk, helmsman Hikaru Sulu and chief engineer Olson, and names Spock acting captain with Kirk as his first officer.
2258-spock-and-kirk-meet-montgomery-scot: At the Delta Vega outpost, Spock and Kirk find Montgomery Scott and Keenser and beam aboard the Enterprise using Spock's transwarp equation; Kirk takes command after a fight exposes Spock's compromised judgment, while Chekov plans to hide the ship near Saturn to rescue Pike undetected.
2258-spock-determines-that-the-red-matte: Spock determines the red matter will collapse Vulcan into a black hole and beams down during the evacuation to save dignitaries beyond transporter range, rescuing his father Sarek but losing his mother Amanda Grayson.
2258-spock-emotionally-unbalanced-by-the: Shaken, Spock sets course for the Laurentian system to regroup with Starfleet; Kirk objects and is marooned on Delta Vega, where he is rescued from hostile wildlife by an older Spock, 129 years on, who mind-melds the situation to him before they head for a nearby outpost.
2258-the-enterprise-arrives-only-to-find: The Enterprise arrives to a debris field and finds the Narada drilling into Vulcan, and Nero orders her destroyed before realizing which ship he's firing on.
2258-the-narada-a-romulan-mining-vessel-: The Narada, a Romulan mining ship from a future where a supernova threatened the galaxy, destroys forty-seven Klingon warbirds near their prison planet before Nero captures the arriving Jellyfish and strands Spock on Delta Vega to watch Vulcan's destruction.
2258-the-newly-repaired-uss-enterprise-d: The newly repaired USS Enterprise departs spacedock for Edrin II.
2258-the-uss-discovery-travels-to-3189-v: The USS Discovery passes through a wormhole to the year 3189.
2258-under-the-command-of-james-t-kirk-t: Kirk takes the Enterprise out with the crew who helped him stop Nero.
2258-vulcan-itself-is-destroyed-spock-pr: Vulcan is destroyed; Spock privately puts the survivors at no more than ten thousand, making him a member of an endangered species.
2259-a-new-first-servant-is-selected-on-: A new First Servant is chosen on Majalis.
2259-a-new-variant-of-the-starfleet-comm: Starfleet introduces a new communicator variant.
2259-a-new-variant-of-the-starfleet-flag: Starfleet introduces a new flag officer uniform variant.
2259-a-new-variant-of-the-starfleet-tric: Starfleet introduces a new tricorder variant.
2259-a-new-variant-of-the-type-2-phaser-: Starfleet introduces a new Type 2 phaser variant.
2259-after-crash-landing-on-valeo-beta-v: After crash-landing on Valeo Beta V, the Peregrine's crew is killed by Gorn hatchlings, and the Enterprise later salvages the wreck.
2259-as-of-this-year-the-ketha-province-: The Ketha Province has stood empty for decades by this point.
2259-at-starfleet-headquarters-marcus-co: Harrison attacks a Starfleet summit, killing Pike, then escapes by transwarp beam to Qo'noS.
2259-both-damaged-ships-begin-falling-to: Kirk dies repairing the Enterprise's warp core as both ships fall toward Earth.
2259-cadet-nyota-uhura-is-assigned-to-th: Cadet Nyota Uhura is assigned to the Enterprise as communications officer.
2259-cadet-uhura-is-promoted-to-ensign: Cadet Uhura is promoted to ensign.
2259-captain-pike-is-promoted-to-fleet-c: Captain Pike is promoted to fleet captain.
2259-carol-marcus-comes-aboard-the-enter: Carol Marcus joins the Enterprise; Scott and Keenser resign over the sealed torpedoes, and Chekov takes engineering.
2259-christine-chapel-is-assigned-to-the: Christine Chapel is assigned to the Enterprise as a nurse.
2259-commander-chin-riley-is-cleared-of-: Commander Chin-Riley is cleared of all charges and resumes her Enterprise duties.
2259-commander-pelia-joins-the-enterpris: Commander Pelia joins the Enterprise as chief engineer.
2259-doctor-joseph-m-benga-is-assigned-t: Doctor Joseph M'Benga is assigned to the Enterprise as chief medical officer.
2259-ensigns-brad-boimler-and-beckett-ma: Ensigns Brad Boimler and Beckett Mariner are briefly and unwittingly transported to this time.
2259-erica-ortegas-is-assigned-to-the-us: Erica Ortegas is assigned to the Enterprise as helmsman.
2259-fleet-captain-pike-is-temporarily-g: Fleet Captain Pike is temporarily given command of the Farragut.
2259-general-order-1-is-renamed-the-prim: General Order 1 is renamed the Prime Directive.
2259-george-samuel-kirk-is-assigned-to-t: George Samuel Kirk is assigned to the Enterprise's sciences division.
2259-hemmer-is-assigned-to-the-uss-enter: Hemmer is assigned to the Enterprise as chief engineer.
2259-in-an-alternate-timeline-captain-ja: In an alternate timeline, Captain James T. Kirk commands the Enterprise.
2259-james-t-kirk-is-promoted-to-first-o: James T. Kirk is promoted to first officer.
2259-james-t-kirk-violates-the-prime-dir: Kirk breaches the Prime Directive to save Spock on Nibiru and is sent back to the Academy; Spock transfers to the USS Bradbury.
2259-january-the-crew-of-the-uss-enterpr: The Enterprise crew are caught up in the Mudd Incident and seize a K'normian trading ship.
2259-john-harrison-coerces-thomas-harewo: Harrison forces Section 31 agent Thomas Harewood to bomb the Kelvin Memorial Archive in London.
2259-la-an-noonien-singh-is-assigned-to-: La'An Noonien-Singh is assigned to the Enterprise as acting first officer, later becoming chief of security.
2259-lieutenant-commander-chin-riley-is-: Lieutenant Commander Chin-Riley is taken into custody for violating the Starfleet code of conduct.
2259-lieutenant-hemmer-commits-suicide-o: Lieutenant Hemmer takes his own life on Valeo Beta V to keep Gorn eggs from hatching.
2259-lieutenant-la-an-noonien-singh-take: Lieutenant La'An Noonien-Singh takes leave from Starfleet to help Oriana find her family.
2259-meanwhile-in-the-sol-system-scott-h: Following Kirk's coordinates, Scott finds the hidden yard where the USS Vengeance is being built and stows away aboard her.
2259-on-a-nearby-planetoid-following-har: McCoy and Marcus open one of the long-range torpedoes and find a cryogenically preserved human inside.
2259-rukiya-is-cured-of-her-illness-and-: Rukiya is cured of her illness, transformed into a state of pure energy.
2259-stardate-3177-3-3177-9-the-first-kn: The Federation and the Gorn Hegemony make their first known contact when the Enterprise meets several Gorn ships attacking the Finibus III colony, though no direct contact between crews occurs.
2259-the-archer-is-tasked-with-making-fi: The Archer is tasked with making first contact with the Kiley.
2259-the-enterprise-makes-first-contact-: The Enterprise makes first contact with the Shepherds.
2259-the-enterprise-makes-official-first: The Enterprise makes official first contact with the Kiley.
2259-the-enterprise-returns-to-rigel-vii: The Enterprise returns to Rigel VII under suspicion of cultural contamination and arrests former yeoman Zac Nguyen.
2259-the-enterprise-travels-to-hetemit-i: The Enterprise investigates an abandoned Illyrian colony on Hetemit IX, stranding Pike and Spock planetside.
2259-the-farragut-is-stationed-at-starba: The Farragut is stationed at Starbase 1.
2259-the-planet-cerberus-is-stricken-by-: Crop failure strikes Cerberus during Joanna McCoy's schooling there, and Carter Winston saves the colony with his personal fortune.
2259-the-r-ongovian-protectorate-joins-t: The R'ongovian Protectorate joins the Federation.
2259-the-uss-enterprise-s-warp-core-brea: The Enterprise's warp core fails past the Neutral Zone; Kirk's landing party is intercepted by Klingons while hunting Harrison.
2259-the-vengeance-pursues-the-enterpris: The Vengeance overhauls the Enterprise near Luna; Marcus orders her destroyed, but Scott disables the attacker's weapons.
2259-this-is-the-year-james-t-kirk-was-e: The year Kirk would have finished the Academy had he taken the usual four years.
2259-two-weeks-later-kirk-is-fully-reviv: Kirk recovers, and Khan is returned to cryogenic storage.
2259-una-chin-riley-is-given-command-of-: Una Chin-Riley is given command of the USS Archer.
2260-captain-matthew-decker-finishes-his: Captain Matthew Decker completes his third five-year mission aboard the Constellation.
2260-carol-marcus-officially-joins-the-e: Carol Marcus formally joins the Enterprise crew.
2260-following-extensive-repairs-the-uss: Repaired, the Enterprise sets out on a five-year exploratory mission.
2260-nearly-a-year-after-stardate-2259-5: A recovered Kirk speaks on Federation principles at a memorial ceremony.
2260-the-cayuga-is-destroyed-by-the-gorn: The Gorn destroy the Cayuga over Parnassus Beta.
2260-the-enterprise-s-first-day-in-deep-: The Enterprise's first day in deep space.
2260-the-stardiver-is-destroyed-by-the-g: The Gorn destroy the Stardiver in the Shangdi system.
2261-cyrano-jones-a-licensed-asteroid-lo: Licensed prospector Cyrano Jones begins trading in rare merchandise.
2261-dr-roger-korby-sends-his-last-trans: Dr. Roger Korby sends his last transmission from Exo III.
2261-james-t-kirk-is-romantically-involv: James T. Kirk becomes romantically involved with Janet Wallace.
2261-la-an-noonien-singh-is-tasked-with-: La'An Noonien-Singh is tasked with stress-testing Starfleet's new holodeck.
2261-on-892-iv-flavius-maximus-wins-his-: On 892-IV, Flavius Maximus wins his first arena game, beginning seven years as his province's most successful gladiator.
2261-professor-robert-crater-and-his-wif: Professor Robert Crater and his wife Nancy arrive on M-113, where he begins excavating an extinct civilization.
2261-spock-meets-leila-kalomi-on-earth: Spock meets Leila Kalomi on Earth.
2261-the-uss-enterprise-goes-on-an-under: The Enterprise runs an undercover mission to the pre-warp planet Tezaar, temporarily altering four of five away-team members' DNA to read as Vulcan.
2262-areel-shaw-and-james-t-kirk-meet-ea: Areel Shaw and James T. Kirk meet for the last time before Kirk's 2267 trial on Starbase 11.
2262-r-m-merik-becomes-the-lord-of-the-g: R.M. Merik becomes Lord of the Games on 892-IV.
2262-ss-beagle-crash-lands-on-892-iv-aft: The SS Beagle, badly damaged by meteors, crash-lands on 892-IV, and its crew is captured by the inhabitants.
2262-stardate-2262-18-january-18-james-t: Kirk records a captain's log entry.
2262-stardate-2262-248-september-5-james: Kirk records a further captain's log entry.
2263-a-peace-offering-to-the-teenaxi-del: Kirk's attempt to broker peace between the Fibonan Republic and the Teenaxi Delegation collapses.
2263-ambassador-spock-dies-on-new-vulcan: Ambassador Spock dies on New Vulcan.
2263-an-infant-lactran-later-encountered: An infant Lactran later met by an Enterprise landing party in 2269 is born on Lactra VII.
2263-ben-childress-herm-gossett-and-bent: Ben Childress, Herm Gossett and Benton partner up to found a mining company on Rigel XII.
2263-construction-for-the-uss-enterprise: A new USS Enterprise begins construction at Starbase Yorktown.
2263-james-t-kirk-celebrates-his-30th-bi: Kirk marks his thirtieth birthday at a surprise party, toasting the Enterprise and its dead.
2263-jaylah-is-offered-aceeptance-into-s: Jaylah is admitted to Starfleet Academy on Kirk's recommendation.
2263-krall-launches-an-assault-on-starba: Krall's assault on Starbase Yorktown is broken by the Enterprise crew flying the salvaged Franklin.
2263-matthew-decker-is-promoted-to-commo: Matthew Decker is promoted to commodore, remaining in command of the Constellation.
2263-montgomery-scott-is-led-to-the-long: Jaylah leads Montgomery Scott to the intact USS Franklin on Altamid.
2263-one-hundred-fifty-men-women-and-chi: A hundred and fifty settlers under Elias Sandoval leave Earth for Omicron Ceti III to found the future Omicron colony, and meet no outsiders again until the Enterprise arrives in 2267.
2263-spock-goes-through-a-cache-of-items: Among Ambassador Spock's effects, Spock finds a photograph of the Enterprise senior crew from the other timeline.
2263-the-enterprise-is-destroyed-by-kral: Krall's swarm ships destroy the Enterprise over Altamid.
2263-the-uss-enterprise-makes-a-reprovis: The Enterprise puts in at Yorktown Station to resupply.
2264-carter-winston-disappears-in-a-mete: Carter Winston vanishes in a meteor storm; his ship crashes on Vendor, where an inhabitant saves him.
2264-in-an-alternate-timeline-captain-ja: In an alternate timeline, Kirk commands the USS Enterprise.
2264-in-the-same-timeline-commander-thel: In the same alternate timeline, Commander Thelin becomes the Enterprise's first officer.
2264-spock-visits-his-parents-on-vulcan-: Spock visits his parents on Vulcan for what will be the last time in four years.
2264-the-omicron-colony-is-established-a: The Omicron colony is established at Omicron Ceti III.
2264-tuvok-is-born-on-vulcanis-lunar-col: Tuvok born on the Vulcanis Lunar Colony.
2265-a-bottle-from-this-year-s-vintage-o: A Dom Pérignon of this vintage is kept back to christen the Enterprise-B in 2293.
2265-a-new-uniform-is-introduced-for-sta: Starfleet introduces a new uniform, worn alongside the older style into the 2270s.
2265-at-a-christmas-party-held-in-the-en: At a Christmas party in the Enterprise's science lab, Kirk meets Dr. Helen Noel during a mission to the Tantalus V rehabilitation colony.
2265-captain-christopher-pike-is-again-p: Christopher Pike is again promoted to fleet captain.
2265-captain-james-t-kirk-assumes-comman: Kirk takes command of the Enterprise for a five-year mission of exploration.
2265-carter-winston-dies-on-the-planet-v: Carter Winston dies on the planet Vendor.
2265-ingraham-b-is-attacked-by-flying-pa: Ingraham B is attacked by flying parasites.
2265-nancy-crater-is-killed-by-planet-m-: Nancy Crater is killed by M-113's last surviving native.
2265-the-borg-swarm-through-the-el-auria: The Borg overrun the El-Aurian homeworld, scattering survivors across the galaxy.
2265-the-enterprise-becomes-one-of-the-f: The Enterprise becomes one of the first Earth ships to reach the galactic barrier at the edge of the Milky Way, a mission that costs Gary Mitchell and Elizabeth Dehner their lives.
2265-the-klingons-and-the-federation-sig: The Klingons and the Federation sign a peace treaty that holds for the next three years.
2266-a-romulan-ship-crosses-into-federat: A Romulan ship crosses into Federation space and destroys several Earth Outpost Stations, ending a century of Romulan isolation in what becomes known as the Neutral Zone Incursion.
2266-a-transport-from-ingraham-b-to-dene: A transport from Ingraham B to Deneva unknowingly carries the flying parasite that caused mass insanity on Ingraham B in 2265.
2266-dr-leonard-mccoy-replaces-dr-mark-p: Leonard McCoy succeeds Mark Piper as the Enterprise's chief medical officer.
2266-dr-mccoy-spills-acid-in-sickbay-an-: Dr. McCoy spills acid in sickbay, apparently mirrored by a similar incident aboard the mirror universe's ISS Enterprise before 2267.
2266-dr-simon-van-gelder-is-assigned-to-: Dr. Simon Van Gelder is assigned to the Tantalus Penal Colony as associate director under Tristan Adams.
2266-due-to-a-transporter-malfunction-ca: A transporter malfunction splits Captain Kirk into positive and negative halves.
2266-famed-archeologist-roger-korby-is-f: Roger Korby is found alive on Exo III among ancient technology, but proves to be an android duplicate, and perishes with the other androids there.
2266-in-an-alternative-timeline-where-en: In an alternate timeline where Pike commands the Enterprise, this leads to open war between the Federation and the Romulans.
2266-kodos-the-executioner-is-discovered: Kodos the Executioner, thought dead since 2246, is found alive; his daughter Lenore kills him under Kirk's surveillance before formal charges can be brought.
2266-lieutenant-hikaru-sulu-transfers-fr: Lieutenant Hikaru Sulu transfers from staff physicist to helm officer aboard the Enterprise.
2266-lieutenant-nyota-uhura-becomes-chie: Nyota Uhura becomes chief communications officer, Janice Rand the captain's yeoman, and Dave Bailey chief navigator aboard the Enterprise, despite doubts about his inexperience.
2266-on-board-the-uss-enterprise-dr-mcco: Aboard the Enterprise, McCoy kills the last M-113 creature in his quarters as it tries to kill Kirk, having already killed four crewmen.
2266-six-months-before-the-neutral-zone-: Six months before the Neutral Zone Incursion, an accident aboard a class J starship releases delta radiation, killing several cadets and confining Fleet Captain Pike to a wheelchair.
2266-the-antares-is-destroyed-with-all-h: The Antares is destroyed with all hands after the psionic Charles Evans makes a baffle plate vanish from its energy pile's shield.
2266-the-colonists-of-janus-vi-create-a-: The Janus VI colonists chart all twenty-two levels of their mine, charts that later prove useful in the 2267 search for the Horta.
2266-the-inhabitants-of-acamar-iii-estab: Acamar III makes peace after generations of war, though the Gatherers remain violent for another century.
2266-the-redjac-entity-incarnated-as-ber: Redjac, this time as Beratis, kills several women on Rigel IV.
2266-the-ufp-makes-first-contact-with-th: The Federation makes first contact with the First Federation through Balok, commander of the Fesarius, and Dave Bailey transfers aboard as a cultural exchange.
2266-the-uss-enterprise-charts-the-l-370: The Enterprise charts the L-370 system.
2266-the-uss-enterprise-undergoes-a-refi: The Enterprise undergoes an internal and external refit.
2267-a-transporter-accident-brings-four-: A transporter accident sends four Enterprise crew into the mirror universe, where Kirk urges the mirror Spock toward revolution against the Terran Empire, a push that eventually leads to its conquest by the Klingon-Cardassian Alliance.
2267-although-not-generally-revealed-the: Unbeknownst to most, the Enterprise finds Zefram Cochrane, long presumed dead, alive on a remote planetoid in the Gamma Canaris region.
2267-dr-janice-lester-leads-an-expeditio: Dr. Janice Lester leads a scientific expedition to Camus II to study its extinct civilization.
2267-ensign-pavel-chekov-joins-the-crew-: Ensign Pavel Chekov joins the Enterprise, becoming chief navigator within the year.
2267-except-for-captain-ronald-tracey-th: An unknown disease turns the USS Exeter's crew to dehydrated mineral crystal in orbit of Omega IV, sparing only Captain Ronald Tracey.
2267-fleet-captain-christopher-pike-is-t: Spock takes Fleet Captain Pike to Talos IV, where he retires into a life of illusory bliss with Vina.
2267-flying-parasites-invade-the-deneva-: Flying parasites invade the Deneva colony; Kirk's crew finds their weakness and destroys them, ending the spreading insanity.
2267-helmsman-hikaru-sulu-s-command-cons: Sulu's console explodes in his face, and McCoy's accidental cordrazine overdose nearly leads him to erase the Federation and Starfleet from history.
2267-nimbus-iii-is-jointly-established-a: The Federation, Romulans and Klingons jointly found Nimbus III as a planet of galactic peace.
2267-starfleet-loses-contact-with-john-g: Starfleet loses contact with cultural observer John Gill on Ekos and eventually sends the Enterprise to investigate.
2267-the-enterprise-visits-a-mysterious-: On shore leave in the Omicron Delta region, the Enterprise crew finds a planet built from their own fantasies; McCoy is seemingly killed by an illusory Black Knight before the Keeper restores him and the crew finally rests.
2267-the-federation-observation-outpost-: The Gorn destroy the Cestus III outpost over a territorial dispute, leading to first contact with them and, through the Metrons' staged duel, first contact with the Metrons too, who are struck by Kirk's mercy toward his Gorn opponent.
2267-the-klingons-provide-the-inhabitant: The Klingons arm the people of Neural with firearms to sway local politics.
2267-the-original-uss-enterprise-shuttle: The original Enterprise shuttlecraft Galileo is destroyed, its five-member crew saved by transporter beforehand.
2267-the-population-of-the-federation-ex: Radiation from a rogue comet ages the Gamma Hydra IV colony to death and afflicts the landing party sent to investigate, sparing only Chekov, until McCoy, aided by Spock, Chapel and Janet Wallace, finds an adrenaline-based cure.
2267-the-ss-botany-bay-is-discovered-by-: The Enterprise finds the SS Botany Bay adrift in the Mutara sector after two hundred and seventy-one years.
2267-the-treaty-of-organia-is-signed-by-: The Klingon Empire and the Federation sign the Treaty of Organia, averting war and opening the way to further diplomacy.
2267-the-uss-constellation-is-destroyed-: The USS Constellation is lost destroying an alien planet killer, taking Commodore Matt Decker and his crew with it.
2267-the-uss-enterprise-uncovers-the-tru: The Enterprise solves the century-old disappearance of the Archon at Beta III, destroys the despotic computer Landru that ruled it for six thousand years, and leaves behind a team to help the planet recover a more human culture.
2268-a-brief-alliance-between-the-klingo: A brief Klingon-Romulan alliance trades technology, including the cloaking device passed to the Klingons.
2268-a-federation-vessel-makes-first-con: A Federation ship makes first contact with the Children of Tama, but their language proves too obscure for formal relations.
2268-a-slaver-stasis-box-is-discovered-b: Archaeologists discover a Slaver stasis box on Kzin.
2268-all-the-adults-of-the-starnes-explo: The alien Gorgan turns the children of the Starnes Exploration Party against the adults, killing them all on Triacus, before Gorgan is destroyed aboard the Enterprise.
2268-ceti-alpha-vi-explodes-and-turns-th: Ceti Alpha VI explodes, leaving neighbouring Ceti Alpha V a wasteland.
2268-dr-mccoy-contracts-the-rare-illness: McCoy contracts the rare xenopolycythemia, cured soon after using the Fabrini's ancient database.
2268-dr-mccoy-with-the-help-of-lieutenan: With Lieutenant Brent and an operations officer, McCoy administers a new treatment to the inmates of the Elba II asylum that could cure mental illness outright.
2268-dr-miranda-jones-boards-a-medusan-v: Dr. Miranda Jones boards a Medusan vessel to help train Medusans as Federation navigators.
2268-dr-richard-daystrom-suffers-a-menta: Richard Daystrom suffers a mental breakdown aboard the Enterprise.
2268-federation-cultural-observer-and-fo: John Gill, Kirk's former history teacher turned cultural observer, denounces his own Nazi regime on Ekos during a live broadcast and is shot dead by Melakon, who is in turn killed by Isak; Isak, Daras and Eneg then agree to set Ekos on a more humane path.
2268-harry-mudd-steals-a-spaceship-to-es: Harry Mudd steals a ship to flee the androids of the Andromeda Galaxy.
2268-james-t-kirk-oversees-a-landing-par: Kirk leads a landing party, with Ensign Garrovick and security officers Bardoli and Swenson, to hunt the dikironium cloud creature on Argus X.
2268-kirk-and-spock-reprogram-the-yonada: Kirk and Spock reprogram the Yonada's course back to the one the Fabrini originally intended.
2268-kirk-commander-spock-and-doctor-leo: Kirk, Spock and McCoy save the mute native species of Gamma Vertis IV from the supernova of Minara by showing the Vian scientists Thann and Lal that Gem and her people are capable of love and compassion.
2268-kirk-invents-fizzbin: Kirk invents the card game Fizzbin.
2268-lieutenant-commander-and-dr-ann-mul: Astrobiologist Lieutenant Commander Dr. Ann Mulhall joins the Enterprise crew as its highest-ranking female officer of the original five-year mission.
2268-lokai-steals-a-shuttlecraft-from-st: Lokai steals a shuttlecraft from Starbase 4.
2268-mccoy-is-briefly-married-to-natira: McCoy is briefly married to Natira.

2360-before-the-cardassians-hit-the-luna: Before the Cardassians strike the Lunar V base, the Bajoran Resistance hides several of its sub-impulse raiders underground.
2360-captain-jean-luc-picard-receives-an: Captain Jean-Luc Picard receives an award from the Galaxy of Planets and Suns fundraiser.
2360-darrell-oja-raymond-is-born-to-thom: Darrell Oja Raymond is born to Thomas and Louise Cara Raymond.
2360-due-to-the-effects-of-iverson-s-dis: Iverson's Disease confines Admiral Mark Jameson to a support chair.
2360-galis-learns-that-dekon-elig-is-imp: Galis learns that Dekon Elig is imprisoned at the Velos VII internment camp.
2360-gul-dukat-is-assigned-command-of-te: Gul Dukat is assigned command of Terok Nor.
2360-in-a-small-village-on-bajor-hovath-: In a small Bajoran village, Hovath becomes apprentice to the sirah, in line to succeed him.
2360-in-the-delta-quadrant-the-wife-of-c: In the Delta Quadrant, the wife of Caylem, a member of the Alsaurian resistance against the Mokra Order, dies in prison.
2360-jono-receives-the-first-of-his-many: Jono suffers the first of many injuries; over the next seven years he sustains a broken arm, two fractured ribs, and a low-grade concussion.
2360-li-nalas-a-bajoran-resistance-fight: Bajoran Resistance fighter and former Terok Nor miner Li Nalas is captured by the Cardassians and presumed dead, spending the next ten years at the Hutet labor camp on Cardassia IV.
2360-mekor-the-son-of-dukat-is-born: Mekor, son of Dukat, is born.
2360-sarina-douglas-begins-to-live-with-: Sarina Douglas begins living with Jack, Lauren, and Patrick.
2360-taya-is-born-on-yadera-ii: Taya is born on Yadera II.
2360-the-son-of-dara-grandson-of-timicin: The son of Dara, grandson of Timicin, is born on Kaelon II.
2360-the-velara-base-on-velara-iii-begin: The Velara Base on Velara III begins terraforming the planet.
2360-vreenak-becomes-a-key-member-of-the: Vreenak becomes a key member of the Romulan Senate.
2360-zek-wins-the-global-tongo-champions: Zek wins the Global Tongo Championship for the fourteenth year running.
2361-botanists-kevin-and-rishon-uxbridge: Botanists Kevin and Rishon Uxbridge move from New Martim Vaz on Earth to the Federation colony on Rana IV.
2361-dr-dalen-quaice-is-assigned-to-the-: Dr. Dalen Quaice is assigned to the starbase, moving there with his significant other Patricia.
2361-lewis-zimmerman-is-assigned-to-the-: Lewis Zimmerman is assigned to the station's Holo-Programming Center, where he begins developing a holographic doctor intended to assist in medical emergencies.
2361-lidell-marries-tolen-ren-on-banea: Lidell marries Tolen Ren on Banea.
2361-lieutenant-william-t-riker-is-promo: Lieutenant William T. Riker is promoted to lieutenant commander for his valor during the evacuation of the research station on Nervala IV.
2361-obsidian-order-operative-iliana-ghe: Obsidian Order operative Iliana Ghemor volunteers for an undercover assignment on Bajor, surgically altered to appear Bajoran and infiltrate the Resistance, with her memories erased.
2361-one-of-the-children-living-on-deep-: One of the children living on Deep Space 9 in 2369 is born this year.
2361-roana-and-her-husband-both-bajoran-: Bajoran entrepreneurs Roana and her husband open a store on the Promenade of Terok Nor after closing their Bajor shop of seventeen years.
2361-the-father-of-jeremy-aster-dies-fro: Jeremy Aster's father dies from a Rushton infection.
2361-the-potemkin-attempts-to-contact-th: The Potemkin attempts to contact the failed Federation colony on Turkana IV and is warned that anyone beaming down will be killed.
2361-the-potemkin-sends-down-an-away-tea: The Potemkin sends an away team led by Lieutenant William T. Riker to evacuate the Nervala IV research station; atmospheric distortion leads the transporter chief to use two confinement beams on Riker, and while the first successfully beams him aboard, the second unknowingly reflects back to the planet and creates a second William T. Riker, later discovered by the Enterprise crew in 2369.
2361-the-shakaar-resistance-cell-includi: The Shakaar resistance cell, including a young Kira Nerys, spends an entire winter hiding in the Dahkur Hills from Cardassian sensor sweeps.
2361-vash-is-hired-as-the-personal-assis: Vash is hired as personal assistant to Dr. Samuel Estragon, a scientist searching for the legendary Tox Uthat.
2361-william-t-riker-and-deanna-troi-mee: William T. Riker and Deanna Troi meet for the first time on Betazed, while Riker is stationed there as a lieutenant.
2361-zek-wins-the-global-tongo-champions: Zek wins the Global Tongo Championship for the fifteenth year running.
2362-a-federation-soldier-miles-o-brien-: During the massacre, Federation soldier Miles O'Brien kills a Cardassian soldier.
2362-beverly-crusher-is-promoted-to-comm: Beverly Crusher is promoted to commander after passing the bridge officer examination.
2362-cadet-ro-laren-graduates-from-starf: Cadet Ro Laren graduates from Starfleet Academy.
2362-dekon-elig-is-killed-by-phaser-fire: Dekon Elig is killed by phaser fire on Velos VII.
2362-ensign-marla-finn-begins-a-romantic: Ensign Marla Finn begins a relationship with Walter Pierce, then has an affair with William Hodges; a jealous Pierce kills both of them in a plasma explosion before vaporizing himself in the Enterprise's plasma stream, inadvertently leaving his Betazoid empathic trace in a nacelle tube bulkhead.
2362-fallit-kot-hijacks-a-shipment-of-ro: Fallit Kot hijacks a shipment of Romulan ale and is caught and sentenced to eight years in a labor camp.
2362-he-later-operates-a-field-transport: Miles O'Brien later operates a field transporter for the first time and saves thirteen men.
2362-in-an-alternate-timeline-in-which-t: In a timeline where the Enterprise disappears mysteriously in 2344, Natasha Yar is assigned to the first Galaxy-class battleship, the Enterprise, after graduating from Starfleet Academy.
2362-o-brien-is-declared-the-hero-of-set: O'Brien becomes known as the Hero of Setlik III after leading two dozen men against a Cardassian regiment at the Barrica encampment.
2362-o-brien-is-transferred-to-the-opera: O'Brien is transferred to the operations division and promoted to tactical officer.
2362-on-mordan-iv-construction-workers-u: On Mordan IV, construction workers use steelplast to seal off tunnel segments beneath the principal city, including the subsidiary tunnel M-4.
2362-quark-loans-his-cousin-gaila-an-amo: Quark loans his cousin Gaila latinum to start a munitions consortium, on a promise of a shuttle in return if it succeeds.
2362-raymond-boone-is-killed-he-is-repla: Raymond Boone is killed and replaced by a Cardassian spy who returns to Starfleet in his place; within the year, the impostor resigns from Starfleet, leaves Boone's wife, and moves to a Cardassian border planet.
2362-rugal-son-of-kotan-pa-dar-is-kidnap: Rugal, son of Kotan Pa'Dar, is kidnapped by a Cardassian officer and taken to the Tozhat Resettlement Center after his mother is killed in a Bajoran Resistance attack; he is later adopted by Bajoran Proka Migdal.
2362-several-prisoners-including-raymond: Several prisoners, including Raymond Boone, are taken by the Cardassians.
2362-starfleet-reports-marla-e-finn-and-: Starfleet reports Marla E. Finn and William Hodges as missing.
2362-the-oshc-investigation-into-finn-s-: The OSHC investigation into Finn's disappearance ends with no result.
2362-the-setlik-iii-massacre: The Setlik III massacre takes place.
2362-the-victory-investigates-the-myster: The Victory investigates the mysterious disappearance of forty-nine people from the Tarchannen III outpost, with Ensign Geordi La Forge on the away team.
2362-under-the-command-of-captain-blackw: Under Captain Blackwood, the Tombaugh is attacked and assimilated by the Borg; among its crew is Ensign Stone, fresh out of Starfleet Academy.
2362-warp-engine-control-systems-are-ins: Warp engine control systems are installed on the Enterprise.
2362-zek-wins-the-global-tongo-champions: Zek wins the Global Tongo Championship for the sixteenth year running.
2363-admiral-norah-satie-begins-a-four-y: Admiral Norah Satie begins a four-year period stationed at planets and starbases in the cause of preserving the Federation.
2363-artim-is-born-on-the-ba-ku-planet: Artim born on the Ba'ku planet.
2363-construction-of-the-enterprise-at-u: Construction of the Enterprise at Utopia Planitia is completed; Commander Quinteros, who supervised it, later accepts a post at Starbase 74.
2363-eight-months-before-her-destruction: Eight months before its 2364 destruction, the K.E. Tsiolkovsky is assigned to study the collapse of a red supergiant star into a white dwarf.
2363-eli-foster-is-born-on-earth: Eli Foster is born on Earth.
2363-george-primmin-becomes-a-security-o: George Primmin becomes a security officer.
2363-greta-vanderweg-begins-her-starflee: Greta Vanderweg begins her Starfleet service.
2363-gul-darhe-el-dies-in-his-sleep-due-: Gul Darhe'el dies in his sleep of a coleibric hemorrhage.
2363-guls-dukat-and-hadar-attend-a-recep: Guls Dukat and Hadar attend a reception at the Bajoran Center for Science to view Odo's abilities, where the Changeling performs the Cardassian neck trick to wide acclaim.
2363-in-his-search-for-the-albino-dahar-: Searching for the Albino, Dahar master Kang finds one of his discarded wives on Dayos IV; he feeds and clothes her and tells her of his murdered son and his quest, but though he suspects she knows the Albino's location, she says nothing.
2363-jean-luc-picard-assumes-command-of-: Picard takes command of the Enterprise.
2363-natima-lang-an-agent-of-the-cardass: Cardassian Communication Service agent Natima Lang becomes romantically involved with bartender Quark, who is illegally selling food to Bajorans; he in turn uses her access codes to steal from the Cardassian government.
2363-on-tyrus-vii-dr-farallon-begins-wor: On Tyrus VII, Dr. Farallon begins work on the particle fountain project.
2363-on-velara-iii-drilling-operations-b: On Velara III, drilling operations begin to tap water in the subsurface layer.
2363-prior-to-formally-taking-command-of: Before formally taking command, Picard picks his senior staff, choosing Riker as first officer alongside La Forge and Yar.
2363-the-dilithium-crystal-chamber-that-: The dilithium crystal chamber later used on the Enterprise is designed at outpost Seran T-1 and installed on the ship at Utopia Planitia Fleet Yards.
2363-the-enterprise-begins-its-shakedown: The Enterprise begins its shakedown mission out of spacedock before returning to dock at Earth Station McKinley.
2363-the-enterprise-is-commissioned-at-t: The Enterprise is commissioned at the Utopia Planitia Fleet Yards, Mars.
2363-the-enterprise-is-launched-from-the: The Enterprise is launched from the Utopia Planitia Fleet Yards.
2363-the-k-e-tsiolkovsky-an-oberth-feder: The Oberth-class Federation science vessel K.E. Tsiolkovsky is commissioned at the Baikonur Cosmodrome, USSR.
2363-the-olympia-under-the-command-of-ca: The Olympia, under Captain Lisa Cusak, leaves the Alpha Quadrant on an eight-year exploration of the Beta Quadrant.
2363-the-phoenix-is-commissioned-at-the-: The Phoenix is commissioned at the 40 Eridani A Starfleet Construction Yards.
2363-the-vau-n-akat-known-as-the-diviner: The Vau N'Akat known as the Diviner arrives from 2436 and begins a twenty-year quest to find the USS Protostar.
2363-zek-wins-the-global-tongo-champions: Zek wins the Global Tongo Championship for the seventeenth year running.
2364-a-ferengi-historian-collects-a-larg: A Ferengi historian collects data on the origin of Federation space travel to market as a nostalgic gift item, including a 2050 image of Shannon Janeway with her family.
2364-a-few-weeks-before-the-uss-enterpri: A few weeks before the Enterprise-D visits the Vandor system, an accident in a research outpost lab on the system's fourth planet leaves two survivors, Dr. Paul Manheim and his wife Jenice.
2364-aamin-marritza-starts-to-work-as-an: Aamin Marritza starts working as an instructor at the Cardassian Military Academy on Kora II.
2364-captain-jean-luc-picard-is-awarded-: Captain Jean-Luc Picard is awarded a Service Award for his time aboard the USS Reliant.
2364-first-contact-made-after-discoverin: First contact is made with the microbrains of Velara III after they attempt contact themselves; they ask to be left alone for three centuries, open to resuming communication with the Federation in 2664.
2364-for-the-first-time-in-what-would-be: Jean-Luc Picard avoids the annual Admirals' Banquet for the first time, beginning a pattern that continues for the next six years.
2364-lore-is-discovered-on-omicron-theta: The Enterprise crew discovers Lore on Omicron Theta and reassembles him, but later transports him into space after he tries to betray the ship to the Crystalline Entity.
2364-mardah-leaves-her-foster-family-on-: Mardah leaves her foster family on Bajor to live on her own.
2364-morn-visits-quark-s-for-the-first-t: Morn visits Quark's for the first time.
2364-natasha-yar-is-killed-on-vagra-ii-b: Natasha Yar is killed on Vagra II by the entity known as Armus.
2364-on-yadera-ii-the-father-of-taya-die: On Yadera II, Taya's father dies.
2364-parasitic-beings-infiltrate-starfle: Parasitic aliens infiltrate Starfleet Command; Quinn and Satie expose the plot and Beverly Crusher finds a way to remove the creatures.
2364-senator-pardek-represents-romulus-o: Senator Pardek represents Romulus at a Barolian trade conference.
2364-several-federation-and-romulan-outp: Outposts on both sides of the Romulan Neutral Zone are destroyed, each power suspecting the other.
2364-six-months-before-the-starship-ente: Six months before the Enterprise-D visits the Omega Sagitta system, Benzan of Straleb and Yanar of Atlec begin courting each other with Captain Thadiun Okona's help.
2364-sneed-is-arrested-on-cardassia-he-i: Sneed is arrested on Cardassia, charged with fraud, and sentenced to two years labor on a Bajoran colony.
2364-starfleet-admiral-mark-jameson-dies: Starfleet Admiral Mark Jameson dies on Mordan IV.
2364-starfleet-begins-a-search-for-a-sui: Starfleet begins searching for a star similar enough to the Kaelon II sun to test helium fusion enhancement.
2364-terok-nor-security-chief-odo-is-mad: Terok Nor security chief Odo is made an officer of the Cardassian court so he can testify in criminal cases.
2364-the-bajoran-ro-laren-graduates-from: Bajoran Ro Laren graduates from Starfleet Academy and is assigned to the USS Wellington.
2364-the-enterprise-d-travels-to-ligon-i: The Enterprise-D travels to Ligon II to acquire a vaccine for the Anchilles fever afflicting Styris IV from the Ligonians.
2364-the-enterprise-is-hurled-to-the-gal: The Traveler hurls the Enterprise to the galaxy known as M-33.
2364-the-enterprise-makes-first-official: The Enterprise makes first official contact with the Ferengi.
2364-the-enterprise-receives-a-strange-m: The Enterprise receives a strange message from the SS Tsiolkovsky, an Oberth vessel observing a red supergiant about to become a white dwarf, and finds its crew dead from polywater intoxication on arrival; Geordi La Forge unknowingly brings the intoxication aboard, and after Jim Shimoda strips engineering of its isolinear chips and leaves the ship unable to go to warp, Data and Wesley Crusher save the Enterprise from a stellar core fragment thrown off by the supergiant.
2364-the-jem-hadar-virak-kara-is-created: The Jem'Hadar Virak'kara is created in the Gamma Quadrant.
2364-the-mythical-planet-of-aldea-is-rev: The mythical planet of Aldea is revealed to exist.
2364-the-romulan-star-empire-returns-to-: The Romulan Star Empire returns to interstellar politics after fifty-three years of isolation.
2364-the-star-beta-magellan-goes-superno: The star Beta Magellan goes supernova, destabilizing computer systems on the nearby planet Bynaus; the Bynars temporarily hijack the Enterprise-D from Starbase 74 to repair their damaged computers.
2364-the-uss-enterprise-d-under-the-comm: The USS Enterprise-D leaves Earth under Picard for her first mission, to Farpoint Station.
2364-the-uss-stargazer-picard-s-first-co: The Ferengi return the USS Stargazer, Picard's first command, to Starfleet custody.
2364-william-t-riker-is-offered-command-: William T. Riker is offered command of the ill-fated USS Drake, but instead accepts posting as first officer aboard the new Enterprise.
2364-zek-wins-the-global-tongo-champions: Zek wins the Global Tongo Championship for the eighteenth year running.
2365-a-328-year-old-mystery-is-solved-wh: The Enterprise crew solves a 328-year-old mystery, finding the remains of NASA astronaut Colonel Stephen G. Richey, whose spacecraft Charybdis disappeared in 2037.
2365-a-month-before-stardate-42823-2-sta: A month before stardate 42823.2, Starbase 73 receives a distress call from the Earth colony of Bringloid V.
2365-a-talaxian-ship-with-a-crew-of-twen: A Talaxian ship with a crew of twenty-three is taken prisoner by the Vidiians and sent to Avery III.
2365-benjamin-sisko-and-solok-meet-for-w: Benjamin Sisko and Solok meet for what will be their last time in ten years.
2365-calvin-hutchinson-meets-beverly-cru: Calvin Hutchinson meets Beverly Crusher for what will be the last time before they meet again four years later on Arkaria.
2365-captain-jean-luc-picard-helps-to-de: Picard's defence of Data against Bruce Maddox's plan to dismantle him helps establish the rights of artificial life.
2365-captain-l-isao-telaka-records-his-l: Captain L. Isao Telaka records his last log.
2365-chu-lak-begins-to-serve-aboard-the-: Chu'lak begins serving aboard the USS Grissom.
2365-commander-william-t-riker-becomes-t: Commander William T. Riker becomes the first Starfleet officer to serve aboard a Klingon vessel, through the Officer Exchange Program.
2365-dr-beverly-crusher-leaves-the-enter: Dr. Beverly Crusher leaves the Enterprise-D to become head of Starfleet Medical, replaced by Dr. Katherine Pulaski.
2365-dukat-brings-odo-to-terok-nor-to-in: Dukat brings Odo to Terok Nor to investigate the murder of Bajoran chemist Vaatrik; Odo meets Kira Nerys and Quark for the first time but does not solve the case.
2365-durango-and-carol-freeman-meet-and-: Durango and Carol Freeman meet and begin a fifteen-year friendship.
2365-eight-weeks-before-stardate-42494-8: Eight weeks before stardate 42494.8, a medical staff examines the twenty-six crew members of the supply ship and judges them fit for duty as the USS Lantree begins its tour of duty in the Gamma 7 sector.
2365-five-days-before-the-first-officer-: Five days before, the first officer is treated for Thelusian flu.
2365-geordi-la-forge-transfers-to-the-op: Geordi La Forge transfers to the operations division, is promoted to full lieutenant, and becomes the Enterprise's chief engineer.
2365-guinan-comes-aboard-the-uss-enterpr: Guinan comes aboard the Enterprise at Captain Jean-Luc Picard's personal request, taking the position of bartender in Ten Forward.
2365-in-a-two-hour-lecture-course-in-ast: In a two-hour astral physics lecture, Wesley Crusher first learns of the Elway Theorem.
2365-in-a-winter-flood-on-mintaka-iii-si: A winter flood on Mintaka III drowns six Mintakans, including four children and two adults, one of whom is the wife of Liko and mother of their daughter Oji.
2365-morn-hain-larell-krit-and-nahsk-tak: Morn, Hain, Larell, Krit, and Nahsk take part in the Mother's Day Heist on Lissepia.
2365-odo-begins-trying-to-prove-quark-is: Odo begins trying to prove Quark is a thief.
2365-one-week-before-stardate-42494-8-ki: One week before stardate 42494.8, Kingsley celebrates her 35th birthday on Gagarin IV.
2365-riker-is-offered-command-of-the-uss: Riker is offered command of the USS Aries but declines to remain with the Enterprise.
2365-starfleet-initiates-a-series-of-tac: Starfleet initiates tactical training and development programs to ready the fleet for a Borg invasion.
2365-the-enterprise-d-reunites-the-desce: The Enterprise-D reunites the descendants of the colony ship SS Mariposa on the planet Mariposa.
2365-the-united-federation-of-planets-ma: Q flings the Enterprise-D seven thousand light years to System J-25, giving the Federation its first sight of the Borg.
2365-the-uss-yamato-is-destroyed-after-d: The USS Yamato is destroyed after discovering the homeworld of the ancient Iconians.
2365-three-days-before-the-lantree-visit: Three days before, the Lantree visits the Darwin Genetic Research Station on Gagarin IV.
2365-tuvok-and-kathryn-janeway-begin-to-: Tuvok and Kathryn Janeway begin forming a bond as Janeway learns to rely on his advice.
2365-two-ferengi-try-to-break-into-fort-: Two Ferengi try to break into Fort Knox around this year.
2365-worf-transfers-to-the-operations-di: Worf transfers to the operations division and is permanently made the Enterprise's security chief.
2365-zek-wins-the-global-tongo-champions: Zek wins the Global Tongo Championship for the nineteenth year running.
2366-a-peace-treaty-ends-the-federation-: A peace treaty ends the Federation-Cardassian War.
2366-a-romulan-ship-which-participated-i: The Klingon Empire captures a Romulan ship that took part in the 2346 Khitomer Massacre; its logs identify the traitor at Khitomer as Ja'rod, father of Klingon High Council member Duras.
2366-alexander-rozhenko-son-of-worf-is-b: Alexander Rozhenko, son of Worf, is born to K'Ehleyr.
2366-ambassador-sarek-is-diagnosed-with-: Ambassador Sarek is diagnosed with Bendii Syndrome shortly before conducting final negotiations with the Legarans.
2366-anjohl-tennan-dies-in-the-batal-lab: Anjohl Tennan dies in the Batal labor camp.
2366-b-elanna-torres-enters-starfleet-ac: B'Elanna Torres enters Starfleet Academy, and speaks to her mother Miral for the last time before the Delta Quadrant.
2366-benjamin-and-jennifer-sisko-separat: In the mirror universe, Benjamin and Jennifer Sisko separate.
2366-benjamin-sisko-wears-his-starfleet-: Benjamin Sisko wears his Starfleet dress uniform for the last time until 2369.
2366-crewmember-sandoval-is-killed-after: Crewmember Sandoval dies about a week after being hit by a disruptor blast.
2366-d-ghor-begins-to-systematically-att: D'Ghor begins systematically attacking the House of Kozak to weaken it financially.
2366-data-creates-another-soong-type-and: Data creates another Soong-type android, Lal, but is forced to deactivate her when her positronic net destabilizes.
2366-dr-beverly-crusher-returns-to-the-u: Dr. Beverly Crusher returns to the Enterprise; Geordi La Forge is promoted to lieutenant commander and Worf to full lieutenant.
2366-four-months-before-stardate-43462-f: Four months before stardate 43462, the Romulan Star Empire censures Admiral Alidar Jarok for openly criticizing its government and reassigns him to a remote sector.
2366-in-a-holoprogram-created-by-barash-: In a holoprogram created by Barash, a research station is set up on Miridian VI.
2366-lore-is-rescued-by-a-pakled-trade-s: A Pakled trade ship rescues Lore.
2366-lurak-t-luco-is-arrested-in-vvalti-: Lurak T'Luco is arrested in Vvalti, Romulus, found guilty of hijacking, theft, and assault, and sentenced to five years imprisonment.
2366-nikolai-rozhenko-and-worf-see-each-: Nikolai Rozhenko and Worf see each other for the last time until 2370.
2366-odo-is-designated-an-officer-of-the: Odo is designated an officer of the Cardassian court so he can testify in criminal cases.
2366-on-rutia-iv-these-events-occurred-p: On Rutia IV, several events take place before stardate 43510.
2366-rabal-is-convinced-by-his-sister-se: Rabal is convinced by his sister Serova's research that warp drive is harming their homeworld Hekaras II.
2366-six-months-before-alexana-devos-is-: Six months before, Alexana Devos is promoted to director of security on Rutia IV, replacing a predecessor murdered by the Ansata; within days of taking command she confronts the separatist group's brutality when a bombed shuttlebus carrying sixty children leaves no survivors.
2366-six-months-before-stardate-43997-co: Six months before stardate 43997, Commander Elizabeth Shelby takes over Borg tactical analysis at Starfleet Tactical.
2366-sneed-is-released-from-prison-he-ha: Sneed is released from prison, having served two years for fraud.
2366-starfleet-begins-development-of-the: Starfleet begins developing the USS Defiant.
2366-starfleet-issues-new-type-2-phaser-: Starfleet issues new type 2 phaser and tricorder designs and redesigns its uniforms into a two-piece style with a higher collar and no shoulder striping.
2366-starfleet-updates-the-uniform-desig: Starfleet updates its uniform design to a two-piece style, keeping the previous design's black shoulders and leggings and colored midriff and sleeves.
2366-the-bajorans-ishan-chaye-jillur-gue: Cardassians execute Bajorans Ishan Chaye, Jillur Gueta, and Timor Landi on Terok Nor after an assassination attempt on Gul Dukat; a second bombing three days later leads investigator Odo to conclude the three were innocent.
2366-the-cardassian-ship-ravinok-is-atta: The Breen attack the Cardassian ship Ravinok, forcing it to crash-land on Dozaria.
2366-the-klingon-high-council-gives-worf: The Klingon High Council discommends Worf after his father Mogh is accused of aiding the Romulans at the Khitomer Massacre; though the Enterprise crew finds evidence that Duras's father Ja'rod was the real traitor, Worf accepts the discommendation to keep the Klingon Empire from civil war.
2366-the-romulan-admiral-alidar-jarok-de: Romulan Admiral Alidar Jarok defects to the Federation with faulty information about a new outpost on Nelvana III, meant to lure the Enterprise-D into the Neutral Zone.
2366-the-romulan-scout-ship-pi-crashes-o: The Romulan scout ship Pi crashes on Galorndon Core while suspected of conducting covert operations in Federation space, nearly bringing the Federation and Romulans to war.
